note: Advisory sandbox value-class cost attribution report. Emits CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED verdicts, never PASS. Read-only over the rules file and the newest census evidence bundle; the tool itself is the trust spine.
title: Value-class cost attribution table (static, read-only; rules x newest census)

subject.note: joins rules.by_task_cell (32 task_cells -> value_class) with the newest census counts {GUARD:5, META:22, NONE:8, REVENUE:3}; both files read-only, sha unchanged

finding.interpretation: The newest census attributes 57.9% of the 38-loop operational cost (22 loops) to META, exceeding GUARD+REVENUE combined (8 loops). The standing_audit_rule 'META cost > GUARD+REVENUE cost -> audit_status RED' is tripped; this report independently reproduces the census's own recorded audit_status=RED. REVENUE lane is non-empty (3), so that rule holds. REPORTED as a finding, not relaxed away.

what_it_proves: REAL rules x newest census -> the join maps a KNOWN task_cell to its declared value_class: gateway_lead_capture is REVENUE per the rules AND lands in the report's REVENUE group (exact anchor mapping asserted)
a MINIMAL MUTATION of the real rules (flip gateway_lead_capture REVENUE->GUARD) moves that task_cell out of the REVENUE group into GUARD -- mutating the rule changes the grouping
REAL census (META=22 > GUARD+REVENUE=8) trips the standing cost rule -> CHECK_REJECTED, mirroring the census's own audit_status=RED (the checker has teeth; exits 1)
POSITIVE-CONTROL census (balanced counts) -> CHECK_OK: a zero-hit is reachable, so CHECK_REJECTED is not a stuck/always-fail verdict
seeding an empty REVENUE lane into the balanced census re-trips CHECK_REJECTED (RED-before-GREEN; no relaxation)
cost totals and shares are read straight from the census counts (attribution is not fabricated)
running the report leaves BOTH ground-truth files byte-identical (sha unchanged); tool is strictly read-only
verdict vocab CHECK_OK/CHECK_REJECTED, never a bare governance PASS; exits NONZERO on any cost-rule violation (not always-exit-0)
chess_patches_applied: runs against the REAL rules + REAL newest census and records CHECK_REJECTED reproducing the census audit RED (no strawman)
positive proof is a minimally-mutated balanced census that legitimately reconciles clean; no cost-rule relaxation
join anchor is asserted on a real declared mapping (gateway_lead_capture -> REVENUE); the rule-mutation red case moves it between groups
reads both ground-truth files, never writes to either (Lock 5 / read-only)
origin=sandbox-advisory / authority=none; reports the cost-attribution finding, never its own PASS
locks_respected: Lock 1/2/5/6/7 append-only (both ground-truth files unmodified, sha unchanged; wrote only inside catalog/builds/MO-3/)
no live call (no network, no Supabase, no sends/deploy)
DRAFT-only N/A (read-only report; no packet/dispatch surface touched)

results.real_data: CHECK_REJECTED exit 1 (META cost 22 > GUARD+REVENUE 8; reproduces census audit_status=RED)

exit_gate_B3: MO-3 done (static value-class cost attribution report joins rules x newest census, attributes the 38-loop cost by value_class, and surfaces the META-cost-domination finding as CHECK_REJECTED; RED-before-GREEN via minimal rule-mutation grouping change + balanced-census positive control).
next_action: Escalate the META-cost-domination finding: 22 of 38 loops (57.9%) are META vs 8 GUARD+REVENUE -- the system is grooming itself; propose retiring META loops or growing GUARD/REVENUE to clear audit_status RED.
